extracted.title: Aitken Creek Lateral Capacity for March 30 and April 1, 2026 Revised
extracted.description:
Further to notice 175682, Westcoast will be allowing the following flow on the Aitken Creek Lateral:

Aitken Creek Lateral Capacity:

March 30, 2026: 678,877 GJ

April 1, 2026: 678,877 GJ

Please see Weekly Outage Schedule for updated Aitken Lateral maintenance.

Changes in operating conditions may result in the capacity being recalled on any gas cycle.

If you have any questions, please contact the CSR hotline at (403) 699-1800.
